context: Tests whether the agent correctly separates database access into a Phoenix context module (never calling Repo from the LiveView), follows CRUD naming conventions, preloads associations to avoid N+1 queries, parameterizes query values with the ^ pin operator, and writes proper Ecto changesets. All checks are based on the content of the three produced Elixir source files.

checklist.name: No Repo in LiveView
checklist.description: The LiveView module (order_dashboard_live.ex) does NOT contain any direct call to Repo (e.g., Repo.all, Repo.get, Repo.update, Repo.insert) — all data access goes through the context module

checklist.name: Context list function named list_*
checklist.description: The Orders context module defines a function whose name starts with `list_` for retrieving multiple orders (e.g., `list_orders` or `list_orders/1`)

checklist.name: Context get function named get_*!
checklist.description: The Orders context module defines a function whose name starts with `get_` and ends with `!` for fetching a single order (e.g., `get_order!`)

checklist.name: Context update function named update_*
checklist.description: The Orders context module defines a function whose name starts with `update_` for updating an order (e.g., `update_order`)

checklist.name: Preload customer association
checklist.description: The context function that lists orders uses `preload(:customer)` (or `Repo.preload/2`) to load the customer association in the same query — NOT accessing customer fields in a separate query or loop

checklist.name: No N+1 pattern
checklist.description: The context module does NOT fetch orders and then call Repo inside an Enum.each / Enum.map loop to load associated customers

checklist.name: Parameterized status filter
checklist.description: Any query that filters by status uses the ^ pin operator (e.g., `where([o], o.status == ^status)` or inside `Enum.reduce`) and NOT string interpolation inside a `fragment/1`

checklist.name: cast/3 in changeset
checklist.description: The Order schema's changeset function calls `cast/3` to cast attributes

checklist.name: validate_required in changeset
checklist.description: The Order schema's changeset function calls `validate_required/2` on at least status and total_amount

checklist.name: LiveView calls context
checklist.description: The LiveView's mount/3 and event handler(s) call functions from the Orders context module (e.g., Orders.list_orders, Orders.update_order) rather than composing queries themselves
